critique:

Step 1 uses f_select_column(*), which simply retains all columns. This is unnecessary but harmless and preserves the data for further processing. Step 1 is correct.
Step 2 infers a full “next after each model” mapping without applying the defined functions to extract or sort by service years (e.g., no f_add_column to parse years from notes, no f_sort_column). Additionally, it assumes “next” is based on service start dates; for entries with an end year (e.g., Aero Commander 500, 1976–1990), “next after” could reasonably mean after the end year, which would change the result (next after 1990 would be 1991 Cessna 404 Titan, not the 1988 Cessna 421C). These unsupported assumptions and missing transformations make the step logically flawed. Step 2 is incorrect.
